package.name: tare_planner
package.description: Message-only package providing the SysNav semantic-map / perception interfaces (ObjectNode, ObjectNodeList, DetectionResult, ...) needed inside the ai_module container so the vendored SysNav perception nodes and our vln_orchestrator can share these types. Msgs only — NOT the base autonomy stack's tare_planner exploration planner (which lives in the system container and ships without these object messages). Definitions vendored from SysNav (BSD-3, Haokun Zhu). These object topics stay within the ai_module container, so there is no cross-container type collision with the base tare_planner.
